name: Cantaloupe with Fruit and Grand Marnier
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine equal amounts of mandarin oranges (fresh or canned), grapes, and strawberries.
2. Add 1 to 3 pieces of each type of fruit per serving.
3. Fill the cantaloupe cavity with the fruit mixture.
4. Serve as an appetizer or dessert.
Source: "Mountain Measures"--Junior League of Charleston, WV ed. 1974
